source: Atlanta Event Finder cron — 2-week couples date planner
notes: Two-week couples digest for 6/22 – 7/6/2026. Fresh additions this run: Mo Amer (Helium 6/26–28), Shakira at State Farm Arena (Fri 6/26 + Sun 6/28), AFROXFEST in Candler Park (Sat 6/27), Dinner and A Date soul show + Soul Sundays rooftop + Bamba Afrobeats day party + Yon Re El Herbie tribute (all Sun 6/28), R.A.S World Cup reggae/afrobeat/soca rooftop (Wed 6/24), Latin Wednesdays at Tongue & Groove (Wed 7/1). Headline couples pick: Shakira Fri 6/26 — full-arena singalong, easy walk from a downtown dinner. Comedy pick: Mo Amer at Helium or Paula Poundstone at Buckhead Theatre (both Fri 6/26). Afrobeat pick: AFROXFEST Saturday in Candler Park. Reggae pick: R.A.S World Cup on 6/24 (midweek warm-up) or Rum Punch Fest on the rooftop 7/4. Calendar APIs still flaky — confirm dates/prices via the linked venue before booking.
